Description: Area fill opacity (0-1 typical, max 2 for legacy).
Data label configuration for bar series.
Display value labels on bar data points. Default: `false`.
Missing data interpolation configuration for line and area series.
Visually distinguish fitted segments with a dashed line style and reduced area opacity.
How to render line and area edges when data does not cover the full X domain. Possible values: `"none"`, `"zero"`, `"nearest"`.
Fitting function type for missing data. Possible values: `"none"`, `"zero"`, `"linear"`, `"carry"`, `"lookahead"`, `"average"`, `"nearest"`.
Curve interpolation method for line and area series. Possible values: `"linear"`, `"smooth"`, `"stepped"`.
Visual overlays drawn on top of the chart canvas.
Show current time marker line. Default: `false`.
Show partial bucket indicators at time range edges. Default: `false`.
Data point marker settings for line and area series.
Data point marker visibility on line and area series. Possible values: `"auto"`, `"visible"`, `"hidden"`.
